message:
perf(net/tcp): reduce mutex hold time in TcpListener::register_interest

Restructure register_interest() to scope the registration mutex lock
tighter by computing the rearm decision inside a block and dropping
the guard before returning, instead of holding it across the entire
method body including the driver.register() call path.

- Introduce RearmDecision enum to capture rearm outcome while lock
  is held, then process the decision after dropping the guard
- Add explicit drop(state) in calculate_backoff after reading fields
- Re-acquire registration lock only for the narrow driver.register()
  store, then drop immediately

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
